description: openaiops-platform feature ledger. Cross-session contract; status transitions are real product gates.
source: Pivoted from archived OpenAIOps repo per its ADR-0007 (2026-05-24).

history.event: Repo created + features.json with SLICE-0 (status: building)
SLICE-0 done — CI green, 8/8 ACs verified (AC-7 partial: goose down not auto-tested)
PRE-1 resolved — ADR-0002 chose ch-migrate service (Option B); scaffold landed + smoke verified
PRE-2 resolved — ADR-0003 chose split cmd/query/ (Option B) under Heavy-soon workload assumption; spec + ADR landed, no code changes yet
PRE-3 resolved — chquery package (MustTenantScope helper + Conn wrapper) + Row Policy template + prod CH custom_settings config + build-time lint. SLICE-1 unblocked. 7 commits 80344d7..ce7ed1b.

SLICE-1 spec landed (docs/specs/2026-05-25-slice-1-trace-design.md) — brainstormed Bearer-on-receiver tenant trust + ingester-as-OTLP-receiver (Collector out of data path) + chquery.Batch wrapper closing SLICE-1-PREP-1. AC #1/#3/#7/#9 evolved (see acceptance_criteria below). Next: writing-plans for docs/plans/2026-05-25-slice-1-plan.md.

SLICE-1 done — 16 tasks, ~27 commits, 10/10 ACs verified. Three bugs caught + fixed during execution (ingester IncludeMetadata both transports; CH replay-safety; frontend nginx /api/v1/traces routing). See deploy/SLICE-1-evidence.txt.
SLICE-1-PREP-1 resolved — chquery.Conn.PrepareBatch + *chquery.Batch wrapper landed in commit 1a00986; tenant pinned at PrepareBatch time, smoke-verified with TestSmoke_BatchTenantIsolation.

features.title: Foundation — repo skeleton + docker-compose stack + multi-tenant gateway shell

evidence.ac_summary: 8 ACs total: 7 PASS + 1 PARTIAL (AC-7: goose down rollback exists as SQL but not auto-tested in CI; manually verifiable via `goose -dir backend/migrations postgres ... down`).
evidence.spec_compliance_runs: 8 spec reviews + 7 code quality reviews dispatched during execution; 1 review-driven fix loop on T1 (vendor gitignore + seed/smoke README accuracy) and 4 CI iteration cycles on T14.
bugs_caught_during_execution: T13 nginx.conf missing /api proxy block — would have silently 'authenticated' with empty tenant data; caught when CI E2E ran
T14 NaiveUI NInput wraps actual <input> in a div with data-testid; tests needed .locator('input') to drill in
T14 Node 25 stripped Storage.clear(); jsdom shim added

features.current_state: Empty repo just created. No code, no infra, no auth.
features.target_state: Engineer can `docker-compose up`, get a stack with PG/Redis/CH/Collector/Caddy/gateway/frontend; curl `/healthz` with a Bearer key returns tenant_id; browser shows Login page (中/英 switchable); CI green.
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose up brings stack to healthy state (all services)
curl with valid Bearer API key on /healthz returns 200 + tenant_id JSON
curl without / with wrong key returns 401
two tenants seeded; each key resolves to its own tenant (no cross-talk)
Login page renders in zh-CN by default; can switch to en-US
After login, Home page shows tenant name in top bar
goose migrate up creates 3 tables; down rolls back cleanly
GitHub Actions CI (backend / frontend-unit / e2e) is green on push
out_of_scope: AI agents / RCA (Phase 2 sibling repo openaiops-ai)
Production hardening (TLS termination beyond local Caddy, observability of platform itself, etc.)
features.actual_effort_session: 1 autonomous subagent-driven session (~3h wall time, 14 task implementer + 11 reviewer + 2 fixer subagent dispatches)
features.notes: All 14 tasks in the plan traced to this single feature (per harness-engineering subagent grounding rule). Future slices (SLICE-1 Trace E2E etc.) will get their own feature entries. See ADR-0001 §5 for the slice roadmap.
slice_1_prerequisites: PRE-1 RESOLVED 2026-05-24: ClickHouse schema migration mechanism — Option B (dedicated ch-migrate service) per ADR-0002. Scaffold + smoke verified.

PRE-2 RESOLVED 2026-05-24: Query API deployment shape — Option B (split cmd/query/ from day 1) per ADR-0003, under Heavy-soon workload assumption. Spec + ADR landed; scaffolding deferred to SLICE-1 T1-T3 sequenced after PRE-3.

PRE-3 RESOLVED 2026-05-24: chquery.MustTenantScope + chquery.Conn (clickhouse-go/v2 wrapper) + Row Policy template (backend/ch-migrations/README.md) + prod CH custom_settings_prefixes config (deploy/clickhouse-custom-settings.xml) + build-time lint (make lint-ch). Cross-tenant reverse E2E (3rd layer of ADR-0001 §3.3) is SLICE-1 AC #8.

features.title: Trace ingest 端到端 — ingester (OTLP receiver) + CH traces_v1 + cmd/query + Traces page

evidence.ac_summary: 10/10 ACs verified. AC #2/#6 via migrate-ch-up + system.row_policies. AC #1/#3/#4/#5/#9 via Go unit + integration tests. AC #7 via Playwright traces.spec.ts (4 specs PASS in 3.0s). AC #8 via cross_tenant_test.go (8 sub-tests = 6 AC + 2 HTTP regression). AC #10 via .github/workflows/ci.yml (4 jobs).
bugs_caught_during_execution: T4/T10/T13 — ingester OTel receiver dropped Bearer headers on BOTH gRPC and HTTP unless `IncludeMetadata: true` is set on each protocol slot. Hot-rod masked the gRPC failure (HTTP-only); cross_tenant_test.go locks both transports.
T1 — CH migration replay-safety: CREATE TABLE and CREATE ROW POLICY must use IF NOT EXISTS so the runner can re-apply after a partial-state crash without a hard error.
T8 review — empty list serialized as JSON null (frontend breakage); fixed by make([]TraceListItem, 0).

T16 — frontend/nginx.conf only proxied /api/* to gateway; the new query-side prefix /api/v1/traces was reachable through Caddy (443) but not through the frontend host port (13000), so the SPA on its own port returned nginx 404. Caught by the first Playwright run; fixed by mirroring Caddy's split in nginx.conf. Tracked as drift D4 for SLICE-2 consolidation.

features.current_state: Slice 0 stack runs; no CH tables; no /api/v1/traces endpoint; frontend Traces page does not exist. cmd/query and cmd/ingester binaries do not yet exist. chquery.Conn does not yet expose PrepareBatch (SLICE-1-PREP-1).
features.target_state: telemetrygen / hot-r.o.d. → ingester (OTLP/gRPC :4317 + OTLP/HTTP :4318, Bearer-on-receiver) → CH traces_v1 (tenant-scoped, Row Policy active) → curl /api/v1/traces returns list + waterfall JSON via cmd/query :8081 → frontend /traces page renders list + detail waterfall + JSON. Cross-tenant reverse Go integration test asserts tenant B cannot see tenant A's traces.
acceptance_criteria: ingester OTLP receiver reads Authorization: Bearer <api-key> from gRPC metadata / HTTP header; resolves via auth.PGResolver to obtain authoritative tenant_id; rejects missing or invalid Bearer with 401 + ingester_auth_{missing,invalid}_total counter. SDK-declared tenant.id resource attribute is dropped (cannot be spoofed). [evolved from original Collector-processor framing during 2026-05-25 brainstorming]

CH traces_v1 table created (tenant_id LowCardinality(String), trace_id, span_id, parent_span_id, service, operation, ts DateTime64(9), duration UInt64, status, span_kind, resource_attributes Map(LowCardinality(String),String), attributes Map(LowCardinality(String),String)); ORDER BY (tenant_id, service, ts) PARTITION BY (tenant_id, toYYYYMMDD(ts)); INDEX idx_trace_id bloom_filter; Row Policy tenant_isolation_traces_v1 attached

Go ingester service is itself the OTLP receiver (gRPC :4317 + HTTP :4318, embeds go.opentelemetry.io/collector/receiver/otlpreceiver); writes batches to CH traces_v1 via chquery.PrepareBatch; tenant_id is server-stamped after PG resolve (not propagated from any upstream). Collector is removed from data path. [evolved from original 'receives OTLP from Collector' framing]

Query API: GET /api/v1/traces (list with filters: service/operation/ts_from/ts_to/min_duration_ms, sort ts|duration, limit/offset, has_more pagination) + GET /api/v1/traces/{trace_id} (flat span list for waterfall; 404 if not present under tenant). Both routes live on cmd/query :8081 behind Caddy /api/v1/traces* prefix handle

All Query API SQL goes through chquery.Conn (MustTenantScope helper for Query/Exec; PrepareBatch wrapper for batch writes); make lint-ch CI step rejects bare clickhouse-go imports outside internal/chquery (already enforced from PRE-3 + automatically covers new internal/ingest/ + internal/query/)
ClickHouse Row Policy tenant_isolation_traces_v1 enforces tenant_id = getSetting('custom_tenant_id') at CH level (defense-in-depth on top of builder)

Frontend /traces page (Vue): list view (sortable ts/duration via NDataTable, filter bar) + detail waterfall (hand-rolled SVG, no D3) + JSON subtab. Service Map subtab is a 'Coming in SLICE-3' placeholder; the real force-directed graph component is co-designed with SLICE-3 global topology. [evolved — Service Map subtab body deferred to SLICE-3]

Cross-tenant reverse test as Go integration test (build tag integration) in backend/internal/ingest/cross_tenant_test.go: tenant A ingests via OTLP/gRPC with key-acme, tenant B queries with key-beta → 0 list results + 404 on detail; missing/garbage Bearer → 401; tenant A's own queries see correct counts. Six sub-assertions total.

Per-OTLP-Export-call metering event written to PG metering_events (tenant_id, signal_type='trace', count=spans_in_batch). Write is best-effort: CH commit returns OK to SDK regardless; PG metering failure increments ingester_metering_failed_total + slog.Error. Retry queue is post-SLICE-1. [evolved — best-effort policy made explicit]

Slice 1 CI matrix: backend-unit (existing + new chquery.Batch / internal/ingest / internal/query unit tests) + backend-integration NEW job (-tags=integration -timeout=240s; runs all dockertest suites including cross_tenant) + frontend-unit (+ new Traces vitest specs) + e2e (with new make seed-traces helper + traces.spec.ts Playwright) + lint-ch unchanged
out_of_scope: Topology / Service detail page (SLICE-3); Service Map subtab body lives there
Trace search via attribute index (post-MVP — for now ts-range scan)
AsyncInsert / column-mode batch on chquery.Batch (add when throughput data demands)
Cursor pagination on /api/v1/traces (offset paging ships with documented streaming-drift limitation)
OTLP events / links columns on traces_v1 (cross-jump to logs in SLICE-2 is the planned mitigation)
Proactive 501 stubs for /api/v1/logs|services|topology routes (future slices add their own one-line Caddy handle per CLAUDE.md routing rule)
Collector custom processor (Collector removed from data path entirely; users wanting Collector-style enrichment run their own pointing at ingester:4317)
PGResolver hot-path optimization (Slice 0 known_drift D1 still applies; mitigation if ingester throughput > ~50 req/s)
features.plan: (to be written via /harness:writing-plans — should produce docs/plans/2026-05-25-slice-1-plan.md)
features.notes: First vertical slice (Path B). Spec landed 2026-05-25 after brainstorming session; 4 ACs evolved (see acceptance_criteria entries tagged [evolved ...]). Brainstorming closed open task SLICE-1-PREP-1 (chquery.Conn batch path) by deciding to extend the wrapper rather than open a lint exception — implementation tracked in spec §4. Per Slice 0 plan §5 + lessons (docs/lessons-learned-2026-05-24.md): apply Slice 0 NaiveUI test-selector + nginx /api proxy discipline + Go-version pinning. Plan to use telemetrygen for CI determinism + hot-r.o.d. (--profile demo) for manual visual demo.
